versions.label: v1 - retro rocket

notes.text: [WORKFLOW] Drive this app via window.partwright (see /ai.md). Use runAndSave(code, label, assertions) for iterations; addSessionNote with [REQUIREMENT]/[DECISION]/[MEASUREMENT]/[FEEDBACK]/[ATTEMPT]/[TODO] prefixes; getSessionContext() when resuming.
[DECISION] Built a retro-stylized rocket: tapered cylinder body, ogive nose cone (revolved), 3 triangular fins, porthole window with frame, exhaust nozzle. Used union/subtract booleans throughout.
[DECISION] Color scheme: red nose & fins, gold rings/frame, cream body, cyan porthole, dark steel nozzle. Painted via paintSlab for axial regions and paintRegion for fin/window faces.
